decision_rationale: No prior art reaches kw>=2 / sem>=0.7 / func>=0.7; 5-stage hal continuum + listener-LLM trance proxy + word-repetition reward + adab constraint + kanpna marker + lead+chorus dual evaluator appear novel composition. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.76-0.88 / func 0.74-0.88 on LLM-judge ordinal + emotion-arousal + attention-variance adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged.
